LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT ABZ MISSION, LLC MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. THE MOTION OF ATTORNEY DANICA J. BRUSTKERN TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2026 Vacated

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter.

RULING: The Court takes the hearing of DEFENDANT ABZ MISSION, LLC's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. Dismissal of entire action and all causes of action with prejudice, filed on Dec-04-2025.

Visiting Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 301.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-14-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ABZ MISSION, LLC MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

The motion of attorney Danica J. Brustkern to be relieved as counsel is denied without prejudice. Counsel's motion does not comply with Rule of Court 3.1362, subdivision (c).

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-02-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
